Name: Sync Alerts
Author: Admin

Parameters.Description: Name of the environment, where to search for alerts.
API root of the Crowdstrike instance.
Client ID  of the Crowdstrike account.
Client Secret  of the Crowdstrike account.
Specify how many hours backwards to synchronize alerts. Default: 24 hours.
If enabled, verify the SSL certificate for the connection to the Crowdstrike server is valid.

Description: This job will synchronize Google SecOps Alerts and Crowdstrike alerts. The job synchronizes comments and status. Requires “Crowdstrike Alert” tag on the case. Note: If the alert didn’t originate from “Alerts Connector” or “Identity Protections Detection Connector” you will need to add an “Alert_ID” context value for the job to be able to find the correct information.
